mapper.select: SELECT filter_id AS filterId, board_id AS boardId, column_name AS columnName, label AS label, default_value AS defaultValue, sort_order AS sortOrder FROM ib_board_filter WHERE board_id = #{boardId} ORDER BY sort_order, filter_id
SELECT option_value FROM ib_board_filter_option WHERE filter_id = #{filterId} ORDER BY option_value
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM ib_board_filter_option WHERE filter_id IN (SELECT filter_id FROM ib_board_filter WHERE board_id = #{boardId})
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ib_board_filter (board_id, column_name, label, default_value, sort_order) VALUES (#{boardId}, #{columnName}, #{label}, #{defaultValue}, #{sortOrder})
